visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man with brown hair wearing a black t-shirt and light green shorts stands in an office-like setting with a grey wall. He holds a white piece of paper and stands next to a large black suitcase with red accents. He is smiling and gesturing excitedly. A woman with short dark hair and a black denim jacket stands opposite him. In the background, there is a large cartoonish figure of a monk and a wall-mounted logo that says 'mama baby'. (2) A product close-up features the black suitcase spinning on its wheels against a white marble background. Red text overlays appear. (3) Back in the office, the man continues to point at the paper and the suitcase while speaking to the woman. The lighting is bright and even studio lighting. (4) A series of close-up shots highlight specific parts of the suitcase: the 'eminent' brand logo on the red handle, the red-rimmed wheels with 'eminent' text, and the textured black shell. (5) The man is shown pulling the suitcase across a studio floor. He looks at the camera with a confident expression. The background features colorful geometric shapes and a yellow statue. (6) Several insert shots show the suitcase's utility: snacks placed on its flat top, a cup in a built-in holder, a smartphone on a tray, and a paper bag hanging from a side hook. (7) Inside the suitcase, the man is seen packing numerous folded clothes. The interior lining features a colorful pattern of cartoon figures. (8) More technical shots show the expansion zipper being pulled and internal storage pouches being detached and held up by the man. (9) The man and woman are back together. The woman takes the paper from the man and tears it in half. The man's face shifts to a look of exaggerated shock and disappointment.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator, 1 female staff member.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A male with brown-styled hair in a black t-shirt and denim shorts/green shorts; a female with short dark hair in a black denim jacket over a red shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An office interior with grey walls, a company logo 'Da tou fo', and a large monk statue; transitions to a clean studio with white marble backgrounds and colorful props for product shots.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-pitched, energetic male voice speaking rapidly in Traditional Chinese. An upbeat, rhythmic electronic BGM with a strong percussive beat (approx. 125 BPM) plays underneath. (2) A sharp 'whoosh' sound effect transitions into a product demonstration segment. The BGM continues with high energy. (3) During the feature highlights, various 'pop' and 'ding' sound effects are used to punctuate the appearance of on-screen text and icons. The man's voice takes on a more polished, narrative-style clarity. (4) Sound of fabric and plastic rustling is heard as clothes are packed. (5) In the final segment, the BGM remains upbeat until a prominent 'paper tearing' sound effect occurs, coinciding with the woman destroying the leave request. The man lets out a high-pitched, exaggerated vocal exclamation of shock.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Feature Showcase -> Humorous Twist
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote the Eminent x GArmy collaborative suitcase by highlighting its functional features (wheels, storage, utility) through a comedic sketch about a content creator trying to take leave.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct demonstration of the suitcase features, brand logos visible throughout, and explicit mention of the brand name and collaborative nature.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-energy promotional content utilizing a popular Taiwanese creator (Cai Aga) to merge comedy with detailed product placement.
